content:
I built a nestjs backend, react frontend.
Frontend proxies any /api to nest port
In a feature:
- uploading pdf files, served correctly using /api/uploads which is actually /uploads in nestjs
- uploading any image format, gives 404 always. The file is 100% uploaded, db records targeting it correctly, but for some reason always 404 from nginx.
Have anyone had any problem like this?

  submitted by   /u/naserowaimer
[link]   [comments]
